site.title: My Site
site.subtitle: Manage your website links, popup content, and view leads from your landing page.
site.loadError: Could not load site settings. Try again.
site.saveError: Could not save changes. Try again.

popup.title: Popup Content
popup.textPlaceholder: Enter the text shown in the popup on your landing page…

leads.title: Landing Page Leads
leads.empty: No leads yet. When a visitor submits the contact form on your landing page, they will appear here.
leads.loadError: Could not load leads. Try again.

subscribe.title: Subscription Link
subscribe.hint: Share this link so visitors can subscribe and leave their contact info. When they submit, a WhatsApp message will be sent to them automatically.

notify.title: Notification Settings
notify.hint: Choose how to notify subscribers when they fill in the form. Notifications are sent to the subscriber's contact details.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.hint: Configure Green API credentials. When a visitor submits the subscription form, a WhatsApp message will be sent automatically to their phone number.
whatsapp.messagePlaceholder: Hello {name}, thank you for subscribing! We will contact you shortly.
whatsapp.messageHint: Use {name} to include the subscriber's name.

email.title: Email
email.subject: Email Subject
email.messagePlaceholder: Hello {name}, thank you for your message! We will get back to you shortly.
email.messageHint: Use {name} to include the subscriber's name.

integration.title: Landing Page Integration
integration.tokenHint: Paste this token in your website form. It identifies your account without exposing internal IDs.
integration.snippetLabel: Copy this snippet into your landing page
integration.regenerateConfirm: Generating a new token will break any forms using the old token. Continue?
integration.regenerated: Token regenerated. Update your forms with the new token.
integration.regenerateError: Could not regenerate token. Try again.
integration.testSent: Test email sent! Check your inbox.
integration.testError: Failed to send test email. Check SMTP settings.

subscribe.title: Subscribe
subscribe.subtitle: Leave your contact details and we'll get back to you via WhatsApp.
subscribe.fieldMessagePlaceholder: What can we help you with?
subscribe.successSubtitle: Your details have been received. We'll be in touch shortly.
subscribe.errorInvalidToken: This subscription link is invalid or expired.
subscribe.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
